add_expression_description: Add expressions from languages or regions you’re familiar with.

export_success: Your file has been generated successfully.

global_language_distribution: Explore the richness of linguistic expressions across different regions. Larger circles indicate more expressions in that area.
includes_current: Search results include the current expression.

language_help: Select the language for this expression

meaning_gloss_help: A short phrase that captures the essence of this meaning
meaning_tags_help: Tags help categorize and find meanings (press Enter or comma to add)

no_expressions_found: No expressions found. Try different search terms or create a new expression.

redirect_confirm: Go to My Collections to create a new one? Current progress won't be saved.

registration_verify_email: Thank you for registering. Please check your email to verify your account.
remove_item_confirm: Remove this item from the collection?
same_language_error: Reference and target languages cannot be the same
search_expressions_desc: Find how words and sentences are expressed across different languages and regions.
select_format: Choose a format to export your collection:

source_placeholder: e.g. Wiktionary, Dictionary.com, or a URL
subtitle: Learn New Languages, Preserve Linguistic Diversity
